title: JSON body syntax error due to missing comma
symptom: The HTTP request fails to execute due to invalid JSON syntax, specifically a missing comma between elements.
not_this_if: JSON is valid and executes without errors
root_cause: JSON syntax requires commas to separate objects within arrays. If a comma is missing, the JSON parser will throw an error, preventing the request from being sent.
fix_steps: Review the JSON body for missing commas between objects
Add the necessary commas to separate the objects
agent_instruction: Check the JSON body for missing commas and correct them.
